title: Wikimedia Commons: Church of Saint Moses on Mount Nebo.jpg
content:
File: Church of Saint Moses on Mount Nebo.jpg
Category: Biblical archaeology
Description: The newly built church of Saint Moses was erected over the remains of the Byzantine church, on the mountain where according to ancient tradition the patriarch Moses died without entering the Promised Land.
Artist: John Romano D'Orazio
Date: 2018-06-27 13:01:25
License: CC BY-SA 4.0
Image URL: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/f/f2/Church_of_Saint_Moses_on_Mount_Nebo.jpg
summary: The newly built church of Saint Moses was erected over the remains of the Byzantine church, on the mountain where according to ancient tradition the patriarch Moses died without entering the Promised Land.
